sglang.title: Remove non-accelerated targets(100 and up) from cmake
sglang.author: hlu1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Non-accelerated targets(100 and up) don't need to be included in cmake. Building with sm_100a/103a/110a/120a/121a is sufficient. For forward compatibility without accelerated features like fp8 or fp4, we can include the highest sm, which is sm121, but it won't be of much use so I left it

sglang.title: Optimize moe_sum_reduce_kernel
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
During the Prefill stage of TP MoE, the moe_sum_reduce_kernel operator accounts for a relatively large proportion.

This PR is to optimize moe_sum_reduce_kernel and get speedup up to 17.6%.
DeepSeek-V3 E2E throughput speedup 2-5%.
============Main============
TritonKernel column is the co

sglang.title: [Feature] LMCache Connector Integration
sglang.author: Oasis-Git
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

LMCache is an LLM serving engine extension to reduce TTFT and increase throughput, especially under long-context scenarios. By storing the KV caches of reusable texts across various locations, including (GPU, CPU DRAM, Local Disk), Thus, LMCache saves precious GPU cycles and reduces user

sglang.title: CUTLASS fp8 blockwise gemm support of sm120
sglang.author: jianyingzhu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This pull request adds support for the SM120 architecture in the Cutlass FP8 blockwise GEMM kernel, enabling improved performance on the latest hardware.
Modifications

Introduced an SM120-specific branch in fp8_blockwise_gemm_kernel.cu to leverage new features and optimizations of Cutla

sglang.title: Optimize nvfp4 block scaled gemm kernel when M is small.
sglang.author: HydraQYH
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Until now, the CUTLASS-based nvfp4 block-scaled GEMM kernel used a uniform performance config for all MNKs. This config performed well when MNKs were large, but it resulted in redundant computation when M was small. Therefore, we have optimized this for scenarios with small M. In this PR,

sglang.title: Fix cuda graph mode in flashinfer attn backend
sglang.author: benbarsdell
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
cc @kushanam
Motivation

Modifications

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Qwen3-coder moe tuned config
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When deploying the qwen3-coder model using the following scirpt(H20*8):
vllm serve Qwen3-Coder/Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct-FP8 \
  --max-model-len 32000 \
  --enable-expert-parallel \
  --tensor-parallel-size 8 \
  --enable-auto-tool-choice \
  --enforce-eager \
  --tool-call-parser qwen3
